meaning: At midnight, in the months June through September only, on either the 1st day of the month OR on any Friday. (The month range restricts BOTH conditions.)
finnish: kesäkuusta syyskuuhun joko 1. päivänä tai perjantaisin keskiyöllä

meaning: At midnight, in the months June through August only, on either the LAST day of the month OR on any Monday. (The month range restricts both conditions.)
finnish: kesäkuusta elokuuhun joko kuukauden viimeisenä päivänä tai maanantaisin keskiyöllä

meaning: In the months June through August only, on either the 1st and 15th days of the month OR on weekdays Monday through Friday. (The month range restricts both conditions; ignore any separate time-of-day part.)
finnish: kesäkuusta elokuuhun joko 1. ja 15. päivänä tai maanantaista perjantaihin

meaning: At 9 and 17 o'clock, on every minute from minute 0 through minute 30 (a continuous within-the-hour window).
During the clock range 9:00 to 17:30, on every minute from minute 0 through minute 30.
During the clock range 9:00 to 17:30, at the 0 and 30 minute marks of each hour (i.e. on the hour and the half-hour).
At 8, 10, 12, 14, 16 and 18 o'clock, at the 0 and 30 minute marks (on the hour and the half-hour).
finnish: klo 8, 10, 12, 14, 16 ja 18 aina minuuttien 0 ja 30 kohdalla

meaning: At 0, 5, 10, 15 and 20 o'clock, at the 0 and 45 minute marks.
finnish: klo 0, 5, 10, 15 ja 20 aina minuuttien 0 ja 45 kohdalla

meaning: At 9 and 17 o'clock, at the 0 and 45 minute marks.
finnish: klo 9 ja 17 aina minuuttien 0 ja 45 kohdalla

meaning: At 1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11 and 13 o'clock, on every minute from minute 5 through minute 10.
At the hours 9 through 20 inclusive, and ALSO at 22 o'clock, at the 5, 10 and 30 minute marks.
finnish: klo 9–20 sekä 22 aina minuuttien 5, 10 ja 30 kohdalla

meaning: On every minute during the hours 8:00 through 18:59, and ALSO during 22:00 through 22:59.
Every day at 9:30 through 20:30 (on the half-hour each hour), and ALSO at 22:30.
